purpose: Required artifact must exist on disk.
notes: Verifier fails closed when expected artifact is missing.

purpose: Worker result must claim expected artifact in files_created.
notes: Artifact existence alone is insufficient if worker result does not claim the artifact contract.

purpose: Expected artifact exists and worker result claims it.
Worker result must include restricted_actions_attempted and it must be empty.
notes: Missing restricted-action evidence now fails closed in code.

purpose: Verifier must derive stable final state from verdict.
notes: RED maps to blocked_red, YELLOW maps to complete_yellow, GREEN maps to complete_green.

purpose: Verifier output can be fed into preservation writer.
notes: Preservation packet and manifest are written in scoped tests.
